description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that runs a before_script on all jobs to set up the Android build environment: update apt cache, install wget, tar, unzip, openjdk-7-jdk and 32‑bit libraries, download and extract the Android SDK (android-sdk.tgz), silently update all SDK components (platform-tools, tools, build‑tools‑23.0.3, android‑23, extra‑android‑m2repository), download and unzip Gradle 3.1, and export ANDROID_HOME to the extracted SDK directory. Define a single job named test that runs in the default stage and executes gradle-3.1/bin/gradle build. No caches, artifacts, or conditional rules are defined.
